name: innoclaw-cli
description: Command-line plugin for operating InnoClaw and Deep Research workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run InnoClaw app and Deep Research workflows from the terminal
interface.longDescription: Use InnoClaw CLI to start the local app, run build and test commands, manage workspaces, create Deep Research sessions, start runs, and export final reports without leaving the terminal.
defaultPrompt: Start the local InnoClaw app and verify it is ready
Create and run a Deep Research session from the command line
Export the latest Deep Research report to the workspace
